name: Smono 5 Wear and Tear
summary: Restore your device to peak performance with the official Smono 5 Wear & Tear Set.
description: Restore your device to peak performance with the official Smono 5 Wear & Tear Set. Specially designed for the Smono 5 Vaporiser, this genuine replacement kit includes a new mouthpiece and five precision-fit mouthpiece screens to keep your sessions smooth, clean, and efficient. With regular use, mouthpieces and screens naturally experience wear. Replacing these essential components helps maintain optimal airflow, flavour purity, and overall vaporiser performance. A practical part to keep your device working as it should.
